productDisplayName: Vans Men Chukka Low Grey Casual Shoes
description: Chunky casual lace-up shoe from vans. The world-wide favourite brand for skaters and the stylish just keeps on coming up with the goods. As expected from Vans, this shoe is superbly crafted for comfort and strength to excellent quality standards. In shades of grey suede with white laces for a bright contrast, the cheeky twist is provided by a lovely English tweed on the lining and a bright red sole. The sober colour makes this a great shoe for bridging the gap between casual and semi-formal. Upper Leather suede uppers for durability and comfort Padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
